hero.title: AI for Tradies
hero.description: Your virtual assistant helps tradies manage job bookings, answer calls, capture leads, schedule site visits, and send reminders — so you can stay on the tools, not the phone.

stats.label: Fewer missed job enquiries with 24/7 call answering.
Less time spent on admin, scheduling, and call-backs.
More booked jobs by capturing every lead automatically.

blocks.heading: Built for Busy Tradies on the Move
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we know tradies are often on-site, driving between jobs, or working hands-on—not answering phones. Our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every call, enquiry, and booking is handled professionally, so you never miss a job opportunity. Whether you're a solo tradie or running a growing trade business, our AI adapts to your workflow.

blocks.heading: Spend More Time on the Tools, Not Admin
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist answers calls, books jobs, handles reschedules, and responds to common questions like 'Do you service my area?', 'How much does it cost?', or 'When can you come out?' all in your brand's tone. It keeps your schedule organised while you focus on delivering quality work.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Job Enquiry Again
blocks.description: Missed calls often mean missed income. Your AI Receptionist works 24/7 to capture job requests, emergency call-outs, and quote enquiries even after hours or on weekends. Every lead is logged, followed up, and ready for you when you're free.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Power your trade business with smart automation that saves time, wins more jobs, and keeps customers informed.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Tradies Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Tradies across Australia trust VirtualAssistant.com.au to handle their calls, bookings, and enquiries reliably. Our AI Virtual Receptionist integrates seamlessly with your calendar and workflow, ensuring every customer interaction is professional and consistent. You can customise your AI to match your trade, service areas, pricing structure, and availability so it works exactly like a real receptionist, without the overheads. Let AI handle the admin while you focus on quality workmanship and growing your business.

card.heading: Simple Job Notes & Follow-Ups
card.description: After each job, you can leave a quick voice note that's automatically transcribed and saved. Upload job details, customer notes, or follow-up actions so nothing gets forgotten and every customer receives professional follow-up.
